remarks: ENDORSEMENT SCHEDULE: (1) IL 09 85 01 15 — Disclosure Pursuant to Terrorism Risk Insurance Act; (2) CG 20 26 04 13 — Additional Insured - Designated Person or Organization; (3) WC 00 03 13 — Waiver of Our Right to Recover From Others Endorsement; (4) CG 24 04 05 09 — Waiver of Transfer of Rights of Recovery Against Others to Us; (5) IM 99 01 09 09 — Inland Marine Equipment Floater; (6) CP 10 30 06 07 — Causes of Loss - Special Form. ADDITIONAL INSURED: Quantum Realty Management Inc. is included as Additional Insured per written contract, agreement, or permit as respects General Liability. SPECIAL CONDITIONS: Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement. Per Project Aggregate Limit applies as indicated on the endorsement schedule. LOCATION DESCRIPTIONS: LOC-001: Corporate Headquarters & Main Terminal — 1200 Nationwide Boulevard, Columbus, OH 43215 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-002: Rickenbacker Air Hub — 2500 Norton Road, Columbus, OH 43217 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-003: Cleveland Distribution Center — 6000 Rockside Woods Boulevard, Independence, OH 44131 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-004: Pittsburgh Regional Terminal — 500 Technology Drive, Canonsburg, PA 15317 (Occupancy: Warehouse). NATURE OF OPERATIONS: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Entity type: Corporation.
